title: Stilta raises $10.5M from a16z and YC to help companies rediscover the patents they forgot they had
snippet: Stilta announced Tuesday a $10 million seed round led by Andreessen Horowitz. Other investors in the round include YC and operators from companies like OpenAI, Legora, and Lovable.

title: Solar to dominate energy by 2035, but AI data centers will keep fossil fuels in business
snippet: Costs for solar panels are expected to drop another 30% in the coming decade, helping the tech cement its lead in energy markets.
